speaker: speaker1
text: In foreign trade , exporters have to adjust their product in a timely manner .

speaker: speaker1
text: Exporters must ensure that their product satisfies customers ' needs , wants and likes .

speaker: speaker2
text: Ah , some products are successful at home , but not be popular overseas .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's because the fashion , taste and social customs and so on vary considerably .

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , sometimes the differences are great .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well , we should be in accordance with national conditions and adjust the product .

speaker: speaker2
text: We have to ensure that the product should be attractive to guarantee sales .
